'''Cooper Jenkins''' (born 11 July 2001) is an Australian [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|pr}} for the [[Leeds Rhinos]] in the [[Super League]].

==Playing career==

=== Newcastle Knights ===
He came through the [[Newcastle Knights]] development programme, he was originally a centre due his speed, winning a national title for 200m. As he matured he moved into the forwards, he featured for Newcastle Knights Reserves in the [[NSW Cup|New South Wales Cup]]. In 2019 he featured for the Australian under-18 side against New Zealand under-18.<ref>{{Cite web |date=2019-07-19 |title=Knights selected for 2019 Australian Schoolboys |url=https://www.newcastleknights.com.au/news/2019/07/20/knights-selected-for-2019-australian-schoolboys/ |access-date=2025-06-25 |website=Newcastle Knights |language=en}}</ref>

=== Norths Devils ===
After spending some time training with [[National Rugby League]] side [[Dolphins (NRL)|Dolphins]], he moved to [[Norths Devils]] in the [[Queensland Cup]], where they won the competition, beating the Redcliffe Dolphins 34-20.<ref>{{Cite web |last=Dollin |first=Shawn |title=2024 Hostplus Cup - Grand Final - Norths Devils 34 def. Redcliffe Dolphins 20 - RLP |url=https://www.rugbyleagueproject.org/seasons/qld-cup-2024/grand-final/norths-devils-vs-redcliffe-dolphins/summary.html |archive-url=http://web.archive.org/web/20241121125347/https://www.rugbyleagueproject.org/seasons/qld-cup-2024/grand-final/norths-devils-vs-redcliffe-dolphins/summary.html |archive-date=2024-11-21 |access-date=2025-06-25 |website=www.rugbyleagueproject.org |language=en}}</ref> Before going on to beat the Newton Jets to win the NRL State Championship.<ref>{{Cite web |title=Rhinos recruit rising front row star |url=https://www.therhinos.co.uk/article/21008/rhinos-recruit-rising-front-row-star |access-date=2025-06-25 |website=www.therhinos.co.uk}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=2024 Cooper Jenkins |url=https://northsdevilsrlfc.com/players/2024-copoer-jenkins/ |access-date=2025-06-25 |website=Norths Devils RLFC |language=en-AU}}</ref>

=== Leeds Rhinos ===
In 2025 he moved to [[England]], joining [[Super League]] side [[Leeds Rhinos]], his first appearance came in the third round of the [[2025 Challenge Cup|2025 Challange Cup]], starting in a 0-92 win over amateur side Wests Warriors.<ref>{{Cite web |title=profile |url=https://www.therhinos.co.uk/teams/profile/3153/cooper-jenkins |access-date=2025-06-25 |website=www.therhinos.co.uk}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |date=2024-10-07 |title=Leeds Rhinos confirm Cooper Jenkins signing as Brad Arthur discusses prop's key traits |url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/leeds-rhinos-cooper-jenkins-brad-arthur-signing |access-date=2025-06-25 |website=Love Rugby League |language=en}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |last=Mitchell |first=Ollie |date=2024-11-30 |title=Leeds Rhinos recruit opens up on his tough first experiences under Brad Arthur |url=https://www.seriousaboutrl.com/leeds-rhinos-recruit-opens-up-on-his-tough-first-experiences-under-brad-arthur-99495/ |access-date=2025-06-25 |website=Serious About Rugby League |language=en-GB}}</ref>
